ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., C, RW, D) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "shoots" TEXT /* Shooting hand (left or right) */,
  "position_detail" TEXT /* More detailed position (e.g., Center, Right Wing, Defense) */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_overall_pick" INTEGER /* Overall pick number in the draft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance statistic entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player corresponding to the performance */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "opponent_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent team */,
  "home_away" TEXT /* Whether the game was home or away */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points (goals + assists) scored by the player */,
  "penalty_minutes" INTEGER /* Penalty minutes accumulated by the player */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus/Minus rating for the player in the season */,
  "power_play_goals" INTEGER /* Number of power play goals scored by the player */,
  "shorthanded_goals" INTEGER /* Number of shorthanded goals scored by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played in the game */,
  "shots_on_goal" INTEGER /* Number of shots taken on goal */,
  "blocked_shots" INTEGER /* Number of shots blocked by the player */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits made by the player */,
  "faceoffs_won" INTEGER /* Number of faceoffs won by the player */,
  "faceoffs_lost" INTEGER /* Number of faceoffs lost by the player */,
  "time_on_ice" INTEGER /* Total time on ice in minutes */,
  "time_on_ice_pp" INTEGER /* Time on ice during power play in minutes */,
  "time_on_ice_sh" INTEGER /* Time on ice during shorthanded situations in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_stats_opponent_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to (e.g., Eastern, Western) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to (e.g., Atlantic, Pacific) */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "arena_name" TEXT /* Name of the home arena */,
  "arena_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home arena */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Colors of the team (e.g., Red, White) */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_teams" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the player-team association */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player plays for */,
  "season_start_year" INTEGER /* Year the season started */,
  "season_end_year" INTEGER /* Year the season ended */,
  "captain" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the player is the captain */,
  "alternate_captain" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the player is an alternate captain */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status of the player (e.g., Healthy, Injured) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_teams_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_teams_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
